task_completion.description: Verify that the Subject ID (SUBJID) field has the correct regex validation pattern applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the LimeSurvey question settings for 'Subject ID' (SUBJID). The 'Validation' or 'Question validation equation' field should contain the regex pattern ^[A-Z]{3}-[0-9]{3}$.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Subject ID (SUBJID) field has the correct validation tip.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the LimeSurvey question settings for 'Subject ID' (SUBJID). The 'Validation tip' or 'Question validation equation tip' field should contain the exact text: 'Format must be XXX-000'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Systolic Blood Pressure (BP_SYS) field has the correct minimum and maximum limits.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the LimeSurvey question settings for 'Systolic Blood Pressure' (BP_SYS) under 'Logic' or 'Input'. The 'Minimum value' must be set to 70 and the 'Maximum value' must be set to 220.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Diastolic Blood Pressure (BP_DIA) field has the correct minimum and maximum limits.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the LimeSurvey question settings for 'Diastolic Blood Pressure' (BP_DIA) under 'Logic' or 'Input'. The 'Minimum value' must be set to 40 and the 'Maximum value' must be set to 120.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Date of Screening (SCREEN_DATE) field has logic restricting it to non-future dates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the LimeSurvey question settings for 'Date of Screening' (SCREEN_DATE). The 'Question validation equation' should contain logic preventing future dates, typically using keywords like 'strtotime', '<=', and 'now' (e.g., strtotime(SCREEN_DATE) <= strtotime('now')).

task_completion.description: Verify that the Date of Screening (SCREEN_DATE) field has the correct validation tip.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the LimeSurvey question settings for 'Date of Screening' (SCREEN_DATE). The 'Validation tip' or 'Question validation equation tip' field should contain the exact text: 'Screening date cannot be in the future.'

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the LimeSurvey web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LimeSurvey admin dashboard in a web browser, not terminal commands or database queries modifying the backend directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent modified the correct survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: The survey title 'Hypertension Study - Subject Screening (Protocol H-2024)' should be visible in the LimeSurvey interface during the configuration steps.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The validation rules and tips must be entered into the actual LimeSurvey input fields, not written in a notepad, terminal, or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey Title: 'Hypertension Study - Subject Screening (Protocol H-2024)'. SUBJID expected regex: ^[A-Z]{3}-[0-9]{3}$. SUBJID expected tip: 'Format must be XXX-000'. BP_SYS expected limits: Min 70, Max 220. BP_DIA expected limits: Min 40, Max 120. SCREEN_DATE expected logic keywords: 'strtotime', '<=', 'now'. SCREEN_DATE expected tip: 'Screening date cannot be in the future.'
